productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Lifestyle Gold Toned Ballerinas
description: Get dressed in these jazzy pair of ballerinas from catwalk for that fun look. The metallic finish lends a big dose of glamour to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Synthetic uppers in a cracked metallic finish for added style and durability Metal and stone detailing on the forefoot for extra glam Elasticated mouth for easy insertion and removal of the feet Fabric lining for extra comfort Midsole Soft footbed for greater comfort Footbed stitched to the outsole for durability and style Outsole Rubber outsole in a flexible design for greater flexibility of the feet Grooves in a butterfly design for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
